stemHtml: In regards to CS-25 for airplanes and CS-29 for helicopters, what is meant by the term unusable fuel?

options.a: It is the fuel which is drained from the aircraft due to water contamination.
options.b: It is the amount of fuel not available for use but included on the fuel contents gauge.
options.c: Fuel always remaining in the tank irrespective of the aircraft attitude, due to design limitations.
options.d: Fuel which can be drained during taxi.
